hook.text: A bee gets nectar; the flower gets pollinated. Both walk away better off.

buildup.text: Mutualism means both partners benefit from the interaction.

discovery.text: Mycorrhizal fungi trade soil minerals for sugar with nearly 90% of plant species.

twist.text: Your gut bacteria digest food you can't break down. You're in a mutualism right now.

climax.text: Mutualism is one of evolution's best strategies—cooperation often beats solo play.

punchline.text: The best deals in nature help both sides.

quiz.question: What is mutualism?
options: An interaction where both species benefit
One species benefits and the other is harmed
